pinned specimen

primordial soup

field notes on digital abiogenesis

Thousands of random byte-tapes are paired with neighbours, concatenated, and executed as programs that rewrite each other. With nothing but noise and mutation, self-replicators eventually crawl out of the soup.

Copy of Artificial Life by Ryan Greene — original post

github.com/tarwin/rabrg-artificial-life

space cultivate / rest S single epoch R reseed 1–3 lang version / hide interface G grid lines P census plot T terrain click pin specimen
